allow: PowerShell($files = 'src/engine/challenge.js','src/data/contestants.js','src/data/seasonPresets.js','src/data/schema.js','src/ui/screenCastEditor.js','src/ui/screenSelect.js','src/ui/screenTribal.js','src/ui/screenFinalTribal.js','src/dev/devPanel.js','src/main.js'; foreach \($f in $files\) { $src = Get-Content -Raw -Path $f; $err = $null; try { [void][System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseInput\($src, [ref]$null, [ref]$err\) } catch {}; "$f $\($src.Length\) chars" })
